description_long: This is a single-story brick house with a flat, sectioned roof and a modern, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are clad in red brick, and the roof is finished in a light, smooth material with visible seams dividing it into geometric panels. One side features a large set of floor-to-ceiling glass doors or windows, likely leading to a living area or sunroom, while other sides have smaller, standard windows and a sliding glass door. The main entryway is a simple door with a glass panel, and there are no visible steps or porch. The house's design is minimalistic, with clean lines and a focus on functional, open spaces. The overall appearance suggests a contemporary urban residence, suitable for a suburban or city neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story brick house with a flat, sectioned roof and large glass doors on one side. The design is minimalistic with clean lines and a mix of large and small windows.
description_view_0: This view shows a brick wall with a sliding glass door and a single window, highlighting the simple, functional facade.
description_view_1: This side displays a long, uninterrupted brick wall with no windows or doors, emphasizing the house's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: Here, a prominent feature is the large set of floor-to-ceiling glass doors or windows, providing ample natural light and a modern aesthetic.
description_view_3: This view reveals the main entry door with a glass panel and a side window, as well as a partial view of a corner window structure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and standard windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple glass-panel door with no steps or porch, minimalistic and functional
